item.title: Happy Pride Everybody!
item.description: Traveled to meet a friend today and take them to their first pride parade, was a blast :D Hope you all are having a great weekend! Also, excited for the handful of folks in the comments who are about to realize I am trans whenever I make it obvious like this on Imgur lol ;P

item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: Pallas's Kittens Getting Braver By The Hour!
item.description: First Pallas's Kittens of 2025! On March 31st, four tiny Manuls were born to Altana and Fellini at La Torbiera Zoo in Italy! Just recently, the little ones started venturing out of their den under their mom's watchful eye. And yesterday they came right up to the glass! #caturday #awesome #animals #aww #cute
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: No kings in America TYVM
item.description:
I didn't get to go to the protest, but I did get to serve breakfast to a lot of dope humans headed to the one in our area. I still want to show my solidarity by at least contributing to the usersub flood of the best signs I've seen shared so far. The Navy I joined on June 14, 2011 was not a Navy that represented a country of fascism. I am so happy I do not have to serve under this draft-dodging clown who has the audacity to call our U.S. veterans suckers and losers.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
No. It shouldn't be.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) wants to see change.
NSFW (I'll post the uncensored version in the comments, but be warned.)
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Do you think he is mad?
item.description: Knowing that Putin did it better. Seriously look at this low turnout and absolutely quiet crowd. I'm proud of everybody abroad for showing solidarity with Americans who do not want to be under the rule of this tyrant. As a disabled combat veteran who served in the United States Army. I'm was not okay with this.

item.title: For a state as red as this one is i only expected a few dozen
item.description: But there were hundreds. Super proud Fairbanks for that. Not gonna post pics because I'm paranoid about the already dangerous surveillance state we live in. I mean, democratic politicians are being assassinated.
item.dc:creator: IMSALTYRICK

item.title: I dont know if I want to cry, be happy or embarrassed
item.description: It has been a rough couple of months, looking for a job and living off of very little pay I get from smaller jobs. The 20 was the only thing I had to last me almost a month unless I can do another moving job in two weeks. Card declined few times, and the kid behind me said, "I got this". I feel bad for even let him pay but I was so flustered and panicked that I didnt think. I asked to pay him back but he said no and went out quickly. I am extremely thankful for him but also embarrassed. A grown man should be able to feed himself, not be fed by a teenager. A donation link was suggested but I didnt want to add it here so I put it in my bio.
item.dc:creator: BarkTwainWasTaken
